title: MVP-Totems
description: Personalized totems resourcepack for Millenium, Vaulthalla, and Polaris VHSMPs.
body: Optional resourcepack for Millenium, Vaulthalla, and Polaris VHSMPs. Includes personalized totems of undying for all members, to complement a datapack that will drop all variants from evokers including the vanilla totem.
